keyValues.lrt.producer.import.name: Producer import
keyValues.lrt.producer.import.description: Imports producers from an uploaded file, validates the data, and adds new records while skipping existing ones.
keyValues.lrt.producer.other.names.import.name: Producer additional names import
keyValues.lrt.producer.other.names.import.descript: Imports additional producer names from an uploaded file, validates the data, links them to existing producers, and skips existing aliases.
keyValues.lrt.producer.supplier.mapping.import.des: Imports supplier-specific producer names from an uploaded file, validates the data, and links them to existing producers.
keyValues.lrt.product.import.name: Product import
keyValues.lrt.product.import.description: Imports products from an uploaded file, validates the data, and adds new records while skipping existing ones.
keyValues.lrt.currency.rates.update.name: Currency rate update
keyValues.lrt.currency.rates.update.description: Updates currency exchange rates using current data and saves the new values in the system.
